questions.question: Which therapists & mental health in Dallas Tx are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Therapists & Mental Health in Dallas Tx with weekend hours include: A Better You Wellness (Sat: 08:00-12:00), Planned Parenthood (Sat: off). 2 total with weekend availability.
